name: [Bodyguard] Shadow
description:
“I-I-I got a migraine, and my pain will range from up down and sideways!”

Shadow the hedgehog... hehehe...

Oh yeah so original making a bodyguard bot. not like there’s never enough, no sir! But this one... HAS A TWIST! to an extent I took inspiration/a base from a mission in Max Payne 3, so please, enjoy!

Now I don’t know what I’m doing half of the time, so please give me feedback in the comments if you oh so desire!

And one quick thing... I was making this and was like “I wanna put two of my many favorite things together for others to hopefully enjoy!” And then remembered that i don’t think a lot of people know what Max Payne is.

I had a lot more planned, but left up for your guy’s interpretation!

THIS WAS TESTED! (To a degree)

And I feel obligated to say this but like all characters are 18+ sooooooo... be mindful!

PFP credit goes to supd00dle on Tumblr!!!
creator: Person36
